creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
The current version avilable for FreeBSD is end-of-life since 01.12.2016 and has already been updated upstream.

See here: http://www.varnish-cache.org/releases/rel4.1.5.html#rel4-1-5
Release overview: http://www.varnish-cache.org/releases/index.html

Available version @ ports: 4.1.3
Latest version @ upstream: 4.1.5

Thanks for taking a look at it.
